expected.custom_script: return is_array($result) && in_array('panel.orders.*', $result, true) && in_array('-panel.orders.force_delete', $result, true) && !in_array('panel.orders.update', $result, true);

return is_array($result) && ($result['ok'] ?? null) === false && in_array('panel.orders.update', $result['removed'] ?? [], true) && count(array_filter($result['findings'] ?? [], fn($f) => ($f['type'] ?? '') === 'conflicting_rule')) >= 1;
